title: Settings
subtitle: Tenant configuration, members, integrations, and platform options.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Public-facing name, slug, and tenant defaults.
organization.name: Display name
organization.slugHint: Used in URLs. Lowercase, numbers, dashes only.

branding.title: Brand identity
branding.description: Replace the BOS name, accent color, logo, and font for this tenant. Changes apply to every screen.
branding.appNameHint: Shown in the topbar, login screen, and email templates.
branding.primaryHint: Three-value oklch tuple (lightness chroma hue). Pick a preset below or paste your brand value.
branding.fontHint: Loaded by the tenant; the value goes straight into --font-sans.
branding.previewHint: Live preview using the saved branding.

members.title: Members
members.inviteSubtitle: Send an email invitation. They'll set their password on first sign-in.
members.emptyHint: Invite your team to start collaborating.

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.description: Built-in roles ship with curated permission sets. Custom roles land in a follow-up.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external services. OAuth flows ship in a follow-up.
